center.name: Maulino forest
center.summary: Maulino forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chestnut-throated huet-huet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species sometimes occurs in exotic Pinus radiata plantations, but only if there is a dense understory of shrubs, as it cannot move across habitat without dense understory as shown by a study of the fragmented Maulino forest.{{cite journal |last1=Vergara |first1=Pablo M
